description.en: Complete guide to bolt types and their applications. Learn about hex bolts, carriage bolts, eye bolts, U-bolts, and specialized bolts for different industrial uses.
description.zh: 螺栓类型及其应用的完整指南。了解六角螺栓、马车螺栓、眼螺栓、U型螺栓和用于不同工业用途的专用螺栓。
description.es: Guía completa de tipos de pernos y sus aplicaciones. Aprenda sobre pernos hexagonales, pernos de coche, pernos de ojo, pernos en U y pernos especializados.
description.ar: دليل شامل لأنواع البراغي وتطبيقاتها. تعرف على البراغي السداسية وبراغي العربة وبراغي العين وبراغي U والبراغي المتخصصة.
description.fr: Guide complet des types de boulons et leurs applications. Apprenez les boulons hexagonaux, les boulons de carrosserie, les boulons à œil, les boulons en U et les boulons spécialisés.
description.pt: Guia completo de tipos de parafusos e suas aplicações. Aprenda sobre parafusos hexagonais, parafusos de carriageiro, parafusos de olhal, parafusos em U e parafusos especializados.
description.ru: Полное руководство по типам болтов и их применению. Узнайте о шестигранных болтах, болтах с полукруглой головкой, рым-болтах, U-образных болтах и специальных болтах.
description.ja: ボルトタイプと応用の完全ガイド。六角ボルト、柱状ボルト、アイボルト、Uボルト、さまざまな産業用途向けの专用ボルトについて学びます。
description.de: Vollständiger Leitfaden zu Schraubentypen und deren Anwendungen. Erfahren Sie mehr über Sechskantschrauben, Radschrauben, Ringschrauben, U-Bolzen und Spezialschrauben.
description.hi: बोLट प्रकार और उनके अनुप्रयोगों की पूर्ण गाइड। हेक्स बोल्ट, कैरिज बोल्ट, आई बोल्ट, यू-बोल्ट और विभिन्न औद्योगिक उपयोगों के लिए विशेष बोल्ट के बारे में जानें।

keywords: bolt types, hex bolts, carriage bolts, eye bolts, U-bolts, anchor bolts, structural bolts

heading.en: Hex Bolts: The Most Common Bolt Type

body.en:
Hex bolts are the most widely used fastener in construction and general applications:

DIN 933 / ISO 4017: Full thread hex bolt
DIN 931 / ISO 4014: Partial thread hex bolt

Key features:
- Six-sided head for easy wrench engagement
- Can be used with standard hex nuts
- Wide range of grades (4.8 to 12.9)
- Available in metric and imperial sizes

Common applications:
- General construction
- Machinery assembly
- Structural connections
- Equipment mounting

TradeGo hex bolts are manufactured to DIN 933/ISO 4017 with full traceability and quality documentation.

Carriage bolts (also called coach bolts) feature a round head with a square collar:

DIN 603: Carriage bolt with round head and square collar

Key features:
- Round head provides smooth, finished appearance
- Square collar prevents rotation during installation
- Full thread or partial thread options
- Typically used with hex nuts

Common applications:
- Wood frame construction
- Furniture assembly
- Playground equipment
- Agricultural structures
- Where smooth head is desired on one side

TradeGo carriage bolts are zinc plated or hot-dip galvanized for outdoor use.

heading.en: Eye Bolts: Lifting and Rigging Applications

body.en:
Eye bolts feature a loop (eye) at the head for attachment:

DIN 580: Eye bolt (collar eye bolt)
Eye bolts with continuous eye (forged)

Key features:
- Provides attachment point for lifting or tie-down
- Various configurations: vertical lift, angular lift, shoulder eye
- Load ratings clearly marked
- Must be installed with matching hardware

Common applications:
- Lifting operations
- Rigging and hoisting
- Tie-down and cargo securement
- Temporary attachments

IMPORTANT: Always use matching nuts and washers. Never exceed rated working load limit.

U-bolts are U-shaped with threads on both legs:

Standard U-bolts for round pipe/tube
Special U-bolts for square profile
Heavy duty U-bolts for structural applications

Key features:
- Designed to clamp around cylindrical objects
- Two-hole plate (typically included) for flat surface mounting
- Various coatings for corrosion resistance
- Often used with rubber-lined to prevent damage

Common applications:
- Pipe and tube mounting
- Exhaust system mounting
- Marine applications
- Automotive suspension
- Structural support for tanks and vessels

TradeGo U-bolts are available in carbon steel (zinc or HDG) and stainless steel.

cta.ja: ボルトのお見積もりを依頼
